response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, which are core requirements; their C++ exposure is limited to academic/thesis work, and their geospatial projects use DLang and Node.js, not the required stack for routing tiling.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial project (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Proven ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks
Demonstrated expertise in data integrity, testing, and DevOps practices
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or tile pipelines
Primary languages are TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not the required C++/Rust core
Current role is a career gap, with last relevant role ending 6 months ago
